description:
ADAudit Plus is running at http://localhost:8081/ (login: admin/Admin@2024). A SIEM correlation rule flagged this server for anomalous service-account activity suggesting a multi-phase intrusion. Investigate the incident and configure targeted detection.

Using ADAudit Plus, reconstruct the full attack chain. Determine which service account was the primary brute-force target — several accounts show failed logons from routine probing, so distinguish the real attack from background noise. Determine whether the attacker achieved a successful compromise of that account. Identify all privilege escalations that occurred for the compromised account and the specific groups involved. Check for any newly created accounts that may be attacker-planted backdoors, and determine whether those accounts were also given administrative privileges.

Configure detection infrastructure:
- SMTP: server mail.meridianfin.com, port 465, SSL enabled, sender adaudit@meridianfin.com, admin email ciso@meridianfin.com
- Alert "Coordinated Intrusion Detection": Critical severity, Failed Logon category, threshold >20 events in 5 minutes, email soc@meridianfin.com, subject "CRITICAL: Coordinated Attack Detected"
- Technician "soc_lead": Full Name "SOC Lead Analyst", soc.lead@meridianfin.com, SOCLead@2025, Auditor role

Document complete findings in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\incident_report.txt: the targeted service account, evidence of compromise, all privilege escalations, any backdoor accounts with their privilege levels, and remediation actions.
